notes: v1.14.134 - ICON SYSTEM Stage 2 (Work cards, per web-Claude master handoff section 5). Swapped the 4 Work-grid cards (Deploy/Scan/Handoff/Issues) from Phosphor #ph-* SVG sprite glyphs to branded WebP art, mirroring the Stage 1 Ref-card path exactly: svg.rf-i use(#ph-*) -> img.rf-i-img src=icons/phantom-action-*-256.webp. Files: deploy->phantom-action-deploy-upload-256.webp (accent 8a4bff), scan->phantom-action-scan-radar-256.webp (28e0ff), handoff->phantom-action-handoff-link-256.webp (ff8a00), issues->phantom-action-issues-alert-256.webp (ff2bd6) - all 4 already shipped in /icons/ and already in the sw.js precache array since Stage 1 (all 17 added up front), so NO sw.js asset change this stage - HTML+CSS only. CSS: extended the 96px grid-centering container rule from #ref-grid only to also cover #work-grid (body.rd #ref-grid .rf-card .rf-cic, body.rd #work-grid .rf-card .rf-cic {width:96px;height:96px;display:grid;place-items:center}) so Work cards get the same 76px-img-in-96px-cell breathing room as Ref; the global .rf-i-img{76px} rule is reused as-is. Per-card --rfac accent (corner brackets + glow) untouched; the art carries its own color. Redesign-only scope (body.rd / #work-grid); legacy ?legacy=1 render path unchanged (#work-grid is display:none in legacy); #ph-deploy/scan/handoff/issues sprite symbols left in place (retired in a later sweep). Gates: node --check sw.js + 3 inline scripts, CSS brace balance, three-stamp lockstep, valid JSON. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved, cold-aisle): close+reopen app, reload, confirm v1.14.134 stamp, open Work - the 4 cards paint branded art at the same legible size as Ref (not the old small svg glyph), accents/brackets intact, taps still route (Deploy/Scan/Issues->showWorkTab, Handoff->handoff_quick); Airplane Mode + reload = all 4 still paint (precache proof); add ?legacy=1 = 5-tab legacy unchanged. HISTORY: v1.14.133 = Icon Stage 1 v2 (6 Ref cards, reflections stripped, 76px-in-96px). v1.14.132 = Icon Stage 1 orig (branded WebP onto the 6 Ref cards, new /icons/ folder + 17-file sw.js precache up front).
